then raise sparks of fire (by their hoofs),Footnote-2
and blaze a trail of dust,
and penetrate deep into a host.
Verily man is most ungrateful to his Lord;Footnote-4
and he himself is a witness to that,Footnote-5
and surely he loves riches with a passionate loving.Footnote-6
Is he not aware that when whatever lies (buried) in the graves is overthrown;Footnote-7
and the secrets of the hearts are laid bare (and examined)?Footnote-8
Surely on that Day will their Lord be fully informed about them.Footnote-9
